data.title: Traders cut bets on Fed rate cuts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. short-term interest rate futures narrowed their earlier losses as traders reduced their bets on the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates after the release of employment data. (Jinshi)

data.title: Interest rate futures traders expect the Federal Reserve to cut rates twice this year, in September and December.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Interest rate futures traders expect the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates twice this year, in September and December. (Jinshi)

data.title: James Wynn withdraws final $700,000 from Hyperliquid
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, James Wynn took out the last $700,000 of funds from Hyperliquid and then transferred 250,000 USDC to Kucoin. In fact, he transferred a total of 1.05 million USDC to Kucoin in the past few days.

data.title: The US Stablecoin GENIUS Act has triggered a fierce game between the two parties
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The GENIUS Act, a stablecoin bill that the U.S. Senate is about to vote on, has triggered a fierce game between the two parties. The legislative controversy disclosed on June 6 showed that the bill could reshape the $250 billion stablecoin market, but it was strongly opposed by people such as Republican Senator Josh Hawley of Missouri, who believed that it would give technology giants too much financial control. Hawley accused the bill of giving a green light to technology companies such as Meta to issue stablecoins in disguise. The amendment he submitted requires non-financial listed companies to be approved by the newly established "Stablecoin Certification Review Committee." Although some clauses were adopted, he criticized the final version for weakening key regulatory constraints. The Democratic Party is worried that the bill may provide regulatory arbitrage space for private companies such as Musk's X Money, and plans to propose an amendment to prohibit technology companies from issuing stablecoins. (New York Times)

data.title: Bitcoin technology company Matador completes final non-brokered private placement financing of approximately $1.4557 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin technology company Matador Technologies Inc (TSXV: MATA) announced that it has completed the final round of financing of non-broker private placement, issuing 2,347,903 units at a price of 0.62 Canadian dollars per share and raising 1.4557 million Canadian dollars. So far, the company has issued a total of 7,419,354 units through three rounds of financing, with a total financing of 4.6 million Canadian dollars. The company stated that the funds raised will be used for the Bitcoin acquisition plan. The previous two rounds of financing were completed on May 30 and June 4, respectively. This private placement was initially announced on May 22. (GlobeNewswire)

data.title: The seasonally adjusted non-farm payrolls in May were 139,000, compared with expectations of 130,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The seasonally adjusted non-farm payrolls in the United States in May were 139,000, expected to be 130,000, and the previous value was revised from 177,000 to 147,000.
The unemployment rate in the United States in May was 4.2%, expected to be 4.20%, and the previous value was 4.20%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Non-farm data was higher than expected, and the dollar index extended its intraday gains
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The seasonally adjusted non-farm payrolls in the United States in May were 139,000, a new low since February, higher than the market's expected 130,000 level. The dollar index DXY expanded its intraday gains to 0.50%, currently at 99.23. Spot gold fell to $3,350/ounce, down 0.09% on the day. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. non-farm payrolls for March and April revised down by 95,000 jobs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics: March non-farm payrolls were revised down from +185,000 to +120,000, a decrease of 65,000; April non-farm payrolls were revised down from +177,000 to +147,000, a decrease of 30,000. After these revisions, the combined employment in March and April was 95,000 less than previously reported. (Jinshi)

data.title: India and US Near 10% Tariff Deal Ahead of Trump’s July 9 Deadline
data.description:
Officials from India and the United States have begun two days of closed-door trade negotiations, with both sides aiming to finalize an interim tariff deal. The push for near-term tariff reductions is part of a broader strategy to integrate supply chains, manage political pressures, and reshape digital-era trade cooperation. According to Reuters, negotiators from both countries are aiming to wrap up an interim tariff deal ahead of a July 9 deadline set by President Donald Trump. source: https://news.shib.io/2025/06/06/india-and-us-near-10-tariff-deal-ahead-of-trumps-july-9-deadline/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=india-and-us-near-10-tariff-deal-ahead-of-trumps-july-9-deadline

data.title: Metaplanet sets 210,000 Bitcoin buying plan for 2027
data.description:
Simon Gerovich, Metaplanet’s CEO, announced a plan to accumulate 210000 BTC by 2027, accounting for 1% of Bitcoin’s total supply.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/metaplanet-buying-210000-bitcoin/

data.title: Trump Media & Technology Group plans to issue $12 billion worth of new shares
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump Media, the parent company of social media platform Truth Social, registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission to issue 84,657,181 shares of common stock, worth up to $12 billion. It is reported that the company completed a $2.44 billion financing transaction last week to establish a Bitcoin vault and then register and list a Bitcoin ETF.
(CoinDesk)

data.title: BitMart launches Fly Trade (FLY)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch Fly Trade (FLY) at 22:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on June 6, and the FLY/USDT trading pair will be launched.
Fly Trade aggregates liquidity from DEX, DeFi protocols and bridges, while providing a seamless user experience.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 104,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.75% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jun 06, 2025, 12:02 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 104,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 104,009.992188 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.75% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Yuta Logistics Technology Group plans to acquire up to 15,000 Bitcoins as digital asset reserves
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Yuta Logistics Technology Group, a US-listed company, announced that it has signed a Bitcoin acquisition agreement with a BTC investor. According to the agreement, Yuta can purchase up to 15,000 Bitcoins from the BTC investor, with a total transaction amount of up to US$1.5 billion, and the payment method is to issue the company's common stock to the BTC investor. The actual number of shares issued will be determined by negotiation between the two parties, and will refer to factors such as Bitcoin prices, company stock prices and trading volume. The company said that this strategic acquisition will help build the company's digital asset reserves, further strengthen its balance sheet, and promote the development of its core businesses, including decentralized finance (DeFi) integration, logistics asset tokenization, and smart contract-driven supply chain solutions. (finance.mingpao)

data.title: Michael Saylor: Bitcoin’s average ARR is expected to reach 30% in the next 20 years
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Michael Saylor, executive chairman of Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy), participated in CNBC's "Squawk Box" program to discuss the company's new stock issuance, Bitcoin purchasing trends, crypto regulation, etc. He said: Bitcoin's average annual return (ARR) is expected to reach 30% in the next 20 years.

data.title: Binance Alpha will list Defi App (HOME), trading will be available on June 10
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Binance Alpha will be launched on Defi App (HOME), and the trading opening date is June 10, and the specific time will be announced later. Eligible users need to use Binance Alpha points to claim the airdrop on the Alpha event page. The event page and details will be launched on June 10.

data.title: RBC BlueBay's Dowding Warns of Potential Dollar Depreciation
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Mark Dowding, Chief Investment Officer for Fixed Income at RBC BlueBay Asset Management, reported ongoing changes in asset allocation that are reducing demand for the U.S. dollar. Dowding noted that this trend might persist, and if a new wave of volatility arises, the dollar could depreciate more rapidly. He attributed this potential depreciation to concerns that the dollar has been trading more like a risk asset in recent months.

data.title: Kazakhstan National Bank Launches Cryptocurrency Card Initiative
data.description:
According to PANews, the National Bank of Kazakhstan has announced the launch of its cryptocurrency card initiative, a key component of its digital asset integration project. These cards enable users to make cashless purchases and are linked to wallets containing cryptocurrencies, which can be converted into cash during transactions. This allows merchants to receive payments after selling these digital assets. The transactions will be processed by exchanges located at the Astana International Financial Center, a national financial hub.

The bank also highlighted plans to introduce additional digital asset initiatives later this year. These include the issuance of stablecoins backed by the national currency and the tokenization of financial assets.

data.title: IOST Completes $21 Million Strategic Round of Financing, with DWF Labs and Others Participating
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: IOST announced the completion of a US$21 million strategic round of financing, with participation from DWF Labs, Presto and Rollman Management Groups. The new funds aim to align incentives, support sustainable network growth, and further decentralize validators and ecosystem infrastructure.
